chunks.title: Introduction to the Genealogies
chunks.reason: Sets the context for the chapter by referencing the Book of Kings and the return from exile.

chunks.title: Judah and Benjamin in Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Lists heads of households from Judah, Benjamin, Ephraim, and Manasseh who settled in the city.

chunks.title: Priests in Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Catalogs the priestly families and their leaders residing in Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Levites in Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Lists the Levitical families and their locations within the city and surrounding villages.

chunks.title: Temple Servants and Gatekeepers
chunks.reason: Describes the roles, duties, and specific names of gatekeepers, singers, and other temple servants.

chunks.title: Genealogy of Saul's Lineage
chunks.reason: Traces the family line from Jeiel through Kish and Saul to Azel and his sons.
